/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/mysql_migrate_keyring.dir/__/logger.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql_migrate_keyring.dir/options.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql_migrate_keyring.dir/components.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql_migrate_keyring.dir/migrate_keyring.cc.o -o ../../runtime_output_directory/mysql_migrate_keyring  -ldl ../../components/libminchassis/libminchassis.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmysqlclient.a ../base/libclient_base.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl ../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a ../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a ../../archive_output_directory/libmysqlclient.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libresolv.so -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
